name: Snickerdoodles (#1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter.
2. Add sugar gradually and beat in eggs one at a time.
3. Blend in sifted flour, cream of tartar, soda, and salt.
4. Form balls using level teaspoons of dough and roll them in combined sugar and cinnamon.
5. Place cookies 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for about 8 minutes.
7. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
